message:
fix(gui): set proper version string and target triple at build time

- Pass FRANKENTERM_TARGET_TRIPLE from build.rs via cargo:rustc-env
- Set version to "FrankenTerm <version>" instead of reading uninitialized OnceLock
- Fixes "someone forgot to call assign_version_info" in OpenGL init log

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
